output.title: Security Deposit Recovery Email Sequence: Demand Letter Campaign
output.meta_description: Recover your security deposit fast with our proven 4-email demand sequence. Templates, deadlines, and legal leverage for U.S. renters.
content_outline: Email 1 (Day 0): The Deadline Alert — State Law & Your Overdue Security Deposit
Email 2 (Day 2): The Template Drop — Free Security Deposit Demand Letter Template
Email 3 (Day 5): The Escalation — When Your Landlord Won't Return the Security Deposit
Email 4 (Day 8): The Final Notice — Pre-Litigation Demand Letter for Security Deposit Return
key_points: Subject Line 1: Your security deposit is late — demand it back now
Subject Line 2: Landlord won't return your deposit? Use this free template
Subject Line 3: How to get your security deposit back in 7 days (or else)
Subject Line 4: Final demand: Security deposit return letter required by law
Body Copy Focus: State-specific deadlines, statutory penalties, and certified mail proof to maximize urgency and legal pressure

Keyword Integration: security deposit demand letter, security deposit demand letter template, how to get security deposit back, landlord won't return security deposit, security deposit refund letter, security deposit letter to landlord, how to write security deposit letter, demand letter for security deposit
CTA Strategy: Every email pushes to the DepositBack homepage to auto-generate a state-compliant demand letter in under 5 minutes
Urgency Tactic: Countdown references to state-mandated return windows (14–30 days) and potential double or triple damages for non-compliance
output.cta: Generate Your State-Compliant Security Deposit Demand Letter — Start for Free
output.target_audience: U.S. renters whose landlords have missed the legal deadline to return a security deposit and need a fast, legally sound way to demand their money back
